past_challenges.raw: Transferring mid-year was harder than I expected. The campus felt huge and unfamiliar, and I didn't know how to meet people who weren't in my immediate classes. I reached out to my academic advisor and that helped me find some student orgs.
I wandered around for 20 minutes trying to find my first class. The campus map app was useless. I ended up just asking random students and everyone was surprisingly helpful.
